ai_summary: **Executive Summary:**  Cummins India Limited is circulating its FY 2025-26 Annual Report and has announced its 65th Annual General Meeting (AGM) for August 6, 2026. A material impact is the declaration of a significant final dividend of ₹46 per equity share (2,300% of face value) for FY 2025-26, with a record date of July 17, 2026, and payment expected by September 4, 2026. There are no red flags, but shareholders are reminded to ensure their KYC and bank details are updated for mandatory electronic dividend payment.
